title: The Groper and Rapist: The Lewd Visitor
original_title: 痴漢レイプ魔　淫らな訪問者
overview: After undergoing an eye transplant, blind Yukari gained her first-ever vision. However, ever since then, she has been seeing hallucinations of a stranger being raped and murdered. In reality, these were the memories of the original owner of the transplanted eye…
